title: Middle Eastern Smoked Potatoes
description: A hearty side dish featuring smoky flavors and tender potatoes, perfect for any Middle Eastern-inspired meal.

ingredients.name: smoky potatoes
ingredients.notes: any variety of potatoes will work

ingredients.name: dried thyme
ingredients.notes: fresh thyme can be substituted, but adjust the amount to taste

ingredients.name: garlic powder
ingredients.notes: adjust the amount to taste, as garlic powder can be quite potent

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: use kosher salt or sea salt for the best flavor

ingredients.name: black pepper
ingredients.notes: freshly ground black pepper is always best

instructions: Cut the potatoes into 1-inch wedges or small chunks.
In a large bowl, toss the potatoes with the olive oil, thyme, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper until they're evenly coated.
Spread the potatoes out in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender and lightly browned, flipping them halfway through.
Remove the potatoes from the oven and let them cool slightly before serving.
